tasks.summary: Bumped workflow_contract_version to 2 in both manifests + DEFAULT_WORKFLOW; added interaction/requires/on_satisfied blocks; extended validator; bumped releaseDate. Local node bin/specdev.js next validates v2 manifest and emits status=ok. Global specdev (npm-installed) still on v1 — needs npm link or reinstall before reviewloop steps work.
Added renderStepOutput + findTopLevelInteraction in workflow-runtime.js; DetectedState JSDoc typedef in state.js. Smoke verified substitution + reviewers expansion + no runtime regression.
Migrated detectAssignmentState to 3-arg manifest-driven walk; added loadStateForAssignment helper. Commit 2ded0a8.
Migrated all 6 callers (continue, context x2, check-review, working-memory x2, workflow-runtime) to 3-arg form via loadStateForAssignment or pass-through. Commit 3987af7.

Migrated string-state consumers (hookOutcomesForState/interactionForDetectedState/actionForDetectedState/buildTrace renderers + continue.js/context.js/check-review.js phase resolution) to structured fields. Commit 0f21045.
checkpoint.js manifest-driven; snapshot test text=json. e0a810a
Sticky session-state protocol via .specdev/.session-state.json; reviewloop writes, approve reads+clears on terminal, focus unlinks on assignment switch. Scaffold test file (not run). 3c9a994
on_satisfied continuation blocks emitted by approve.js and reviewloop.js with sticky substitution. cad65e2
Swept hard-coded artifact-path literals in reviewloop.js, implement.js, revise.js, state.js, workflow-runtime.js; migrate-legacy-assignments.js allowlisted. f8d7912
workflow-contract.js reduced to minimal CLI-validation surface; artifactPaths/gateFields removed. 4e724cd
Core SKILL prose collapsed to generic interaction/continuation rendering rule. 4d582a4
init.js specdev-reviewloop template generalized; .codex and .claude mirrors refreshed. f2230e1
Drift test expanded with 4 assertion classes (manifest+SKILL+templates+repo-wide sweep). 1d5ee74
Session-state protocol test: 3 scenarios (autocontinue write+terminal clear, skip-review interrupt-true, cross-assignment stale ignored). ff2fef0
specdev update v1->v2 migration via migrateWorkflowManifest; preserves hand-edited blocks. 208d1ed
